title: The “people’s airline” and the enterprise AI gold rush
description: Everyone wants a piece of the enterprise AI pie, and this week, we saw a string of companies making their moves. From Anthropic and OpenAI announcing new joint ventures targeting enterprise AI deployment to SAP dropping $1B on German AI startup Prior Labs, it’s becoming clear that if you’re a startup building enterprise tools, you’re likely an acquisition target.  On this episode of TechCrunch’s Eq
summary_cn: 本文聚焦企业级AI市场的资本与技术布局。Anthropic与OpenAI合资专攻企业部署，SAP重金投资Prior Labs。对AI产品经理而言，这标志大模型加速迈向规模化落地。核心启示：企业级AI需强化安全合规、私有化部署及与业务系统的深度集成；头部厂商的生态结盟正重塑B端格局，PM应聚焦联合解决方案设计与垂直场景深耕。
